name: Purmandal (Chhota Kashi)
description: A deeply holy temple complex situated on the banks of the sacred Devika river. It is often referred to as 'Chhota Kashi' due to its immense spiritual significance.
history: The Devika river is believed to be the elder sister of the Ganges. The temples here were built by various Dogra rulers over centuries.
famousFor: Sacred Devika river, ancient Shiva temples, Chhota Kashi.
bestTime: Year-round (Busy during Shivratri and Chaitra Chaudash)
